title: hieracium subumbellatiforme
intro: Hieracium subumbellatiforme, also known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Hieracium subumbellatiforme can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
